edits.slides.25.subtitle: Three phases that were built separately now work as one appointment.
edits.slides.2.content: 3Shape, Medit, and Shining3D had already modernised their Rx flows. The iTero architecture had been patched too many times to patch again — the only path forward was a rebuild.
edits.slides.2.issues.1: At this scale, every extra popup per case was expensive
